name: Raymarch Sphere Field
description: A single GLSL TOP raymarches an infinitely-repeating field of spheres drifting toward the camera, lit by a fixed key light and depth-shaded across a two-color gradient. Mirrors what create_raymarch_scene builds with its sphere_field style. All animation/camera/quality knobs are GLSL uniforms (uTime, uCameraZ, uSteps, uIntensity) plus two color uniforms — after import, bind uTime's value to absTime.seconds * <speed> so the field flows (manual-wire — RecipeSchema parameters take constants only). Fills the SDF/raymarch gap left by the v0.7-v0.8 generator wave. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; UNVERIFIED pending live cook-check.

nodes.name: raymarch
nodes.comment: Raymarcher: marches a repeating sphere SDF per fragment; uniforms wired via the Vectors/Colors sequences.

glsl_uniforms.name: uTime
glsl_uniforms.label: Time
glsl_uniforms.description: Animation phase. After import, set this uniform's value expression to absTime.seconds * <speed> so the sphere field drifts (manual-wire — RecipeSchema parameters take constants only).

glsl_uniforms.name: uCameraZ
glsl_uniforms.label: Camera Z
glsl_uniforms.description: Distance of the ray origin from the field along +Z.

glsl_uniforms.name: uSteps
glsl_uniforms.label: Step Count
glsl_uniforms.description: Maximum raymarch steps per fragment — higher resolves distant geometry at the cost of GPU time.

preview_description: A glossy lattice of spheres receding into darkness and drifting toward the viewer, depth-shaded from deep blue up close to hot pink in the distance.
